8gb.reason: Nous-tuned for Hermes Agent tool-call format, ~2GB on disk, fits 8GB RAM with 64K context.

16gb.reason: Good balance of reasoning and tool-use at 7B. ~5GB on disk.

32gb.reason: Stronger reasoning; fits 32GB systems comfortably. ~9GB on disk.

64gb_plus.reason: TAU2 benchmark leader among local models. ~17GB on disk, needs 32GB+ RAM or a GPU.

starters.name: Empty (just domain folders)
starters.description: Starts you with empty knowledge/ subfolders. You add content.
